nodes.name: Check Helpdesk in TO or CC

parameters.subject: ={{ '🔔 New Request: ' + $json.Subject }}
parameters.message:
={{ '
📧 How to Reply:
• To respond to the sender, click the "Reply All" button
• This will keep your teammates in CC and maintain visibility
• Do NOT use "Reply" - it will exclude your team members
--- Forwarded Email ---
From: ' + $json.From + '
Received: ' + $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') + '
' + ($json.bodyHtml || $json.bodyText) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ '🔔 New Request: ' + $json.Subject }}
parameters.message:
={{ '
📧 How to Reply:
• To respond to the sender, click the "Reply All" button
• This will keep your teammates in CC and maintain visibility
• Do NOT use "Reply" - it will exclude your team members
--- Forwarded Email ---
From: ' + $json.From + '

' + ($json.bodyHtml || $json.bodyText) }}

parameters.content:
# Email Routing Rules | Priority | Condition | Recipients | |----------|-----------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| | 1 | Sender contains hrm@pebsteel.com.vn | loi@pebsteel.com.vn, ntb@pebsteel.com.vn, thv@pebsteel.com.vn, tnq@pebsteel.com.vn, ntn@pebsteel.com.vn | | 2 | Sender contains "Vung Tau" or "Vungtau" | **TO:** tnq@pebsteel.com.vn, ntn@pebsteel.com.vn
**CC:** loi@pebsteel.com.vn | | 3 | Sender contains "HCMC" | ntb@pebsteel.com.vn, loi@pebsteel.com.vn, thv@pebsteel.com.vn | | 4 | Default (no match to above) | loi@pebsteel.com.vn

Running: 2025.12.23
update 1: 2026.01.10 - Rule 2_CC LOI
update 2: 2026.01.10 - Changed to insert rows at top (newest first)

nodes.name: Append or update row in sheet

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  values: [[
    $('Prepare Sheet Data').first().json.Timestamp,
    $('Prepare Sheet Data').first().json.FromEmail,
    $('Prepare Sheet Data').first().json.FromName,
    $('Prepare Sheet Data').first().json.Subject,
    $('Prepare Sheet Data').first().json.BodyPreview,
    $('Prepare Sheet Data').first().json.RecipientsTO,
    $('Prepare Sheet Data').first().json.RecipientsCC,
    $('Prepare Sheet Data').first().json.HasAttachments,
    $('Prepare Sheet Data').first().json.AttachmentCount,
    $('Prepare Sheet Data').first().json.MessageID
  ]]
}) }}
